title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power Rat Trap Cage - Humane Rat Catcher for Rats, Squirrels, Mink – Heavy-Duty Galvanised Mesh, Easy Set-Up with Spring-Loaded Door & Transportation Handle – 36cm x 14cm x 16cm
features: PROFESSIONAL-GRADE RAT TRAP – This rat trap cage effectively controls rat infestations. This live-catch squirrel trap captures rodents and small animals such as squirrels and mink. Easy to use, the rat catcher is a simple yet powerful solution for small animal control without causing harm

QUICK AND SECURE – Featuring a highly responsive, spring-loaded, self-locking cage door, this rat trap cage ensures fast and humane captures without injury. The simple setting mechanism allows for hassle-free operation, making the rat trap suitable for placement in a variety of locations

LONG-LASTING CONSTRUCTION – Built to withstand the most demanding conditions, these heavy-duty humane rat traps are constructed with galvanised mesh for enhanced durability. Machine-finished with no sharp edges, it ensures the safety of both the trapped animals and users

EASY TO USE – This spacious rat trap box measures 36cm x 14cm x 16cm and can capture up to 5 rats in a single setting. Use it with The Big Cheese Mouse & Rat Attractant (STV163, sold separately) for optimal results. Designed for humane trapping, the carrier handle allows for safe transportation

ULTRA POWER RODENT CONTROL - Our high-performance Ultra Power products from The Big Cheese will deliver effective results every time - just like the professionals use. As experts in rodent control for over 30 years, you can trust us to take care of your pest problems
description: From the manufacturer Electronic Mouse Killer The Big Cheese Mouse and Rat Attractant (STV163) Ready-Baited Mouse Trap - Twinpack Ready-Baited Rat Trap Kit Live Multi-Catch Rat Trap Ultra Power Rat Trap Cage Add To Basket Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Add To Basket Customer Reviews 3.8 out of 5 stars 919 3.8 out of 5 stars 4,327 4.3 out of 5 stars 9,890 3.9 out of 5 stars 384 3.9 out of 5 stars 5,461 3.9 out of 5 stars 5,461 Price £16.99 £ 16 . 99 — no data — no data — no data — no data £16.44 £ 16 . 44 Description Providing a quick, effective and humane way of controlling mice in the home, this Electronic Mouse Killer delivers a high-voltage charge that kills in seconds once the mouse is enclosed within the unit. Fresh 'n Tasty Mouse and Rat Attractant from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate of any type of mouse and rat trap. Performance tested to ensure effective control of mice, this Mouse Trap comes pre-baited with highly palatable bait that is irresistible to mice. Just one touch is needed to set the mouse traps. This kit is equipped with an easy-to-set Ultra Power Rat Trap which is ready-baited and reusable. The kit is lockable and tamper-resistant, and it will keep captured rodents hidden from sight. This Live Multi-Catch Rat Trap is fully assembled and ready to use. The self-setting mechanism enables continuous trapping of up to 5 rats once the unit is baited and in position. This cage trap is humane, durable, and effective for trapping rats and small animals. Easy to use, captures up to 5 rats, and supports ethical pest control practices.
